variants: Vanja Tomic is an expert in Cognitive Robotics, where he has established himself as a skilled researcher. He received mentorship from Ursula Schmidt, his doctoral advisor, whose guidance was instrumental in his academic growth. In his free time, Vanja is actively engaged with the Blue Harbor Anglers League, indulging in his passion for fishing. Financial support for his innovative research comes from the Seraphim Spark Guild, known for fostering creativity and progress in the field. Additionally, Vanja holds a Graviton Chef License, showcasing his diverse talents beyond robotics.
